title: Crafting Station
discoveryHint: Craft your first bronze item to learn about this.

sections.text: The Crafting Station is designed to reduce the tedium of tool-based crafting. It holds tools in dedicated slots so you do not need to place and remove your Hammer, Wrench, or File from the grid every single time.
Place your GregTech tools in the slots around the grid and they will be used automatically for recipes that require them.
